word: G4684 - σπαταλάω - spataláō - spat-al-ah'-o - Live in pleasure

sections.paragraph:
- Original: σπαταλάω

- Transliteration: Spatalao

- Phonetic: spat-al-ah'-o

- Definition:

1. to live luxuriously, lead a voluptuous life, (give one's self to pleasure)

- Origin: from spatale (luxury)

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From σπατάλη spatalē (luxury); to be voluptuous: - live in pleasure be wanton.
